images.title: Mankini Borat style on the beach - man from the sea.jpg
images.description: Disguised man wearing a green sling swimsuit like Borat Sagdiyev, and a blond wig, on the beach of Dieppe in France. Going out from the cold sea to the beach of pebbles.

images.title: Running for a bath in the sea.jpg
images.description: Two cousins, a boy and a girl, holding each other's hand and both wearing a single shoe while happily running for a swim in the sea of Dieppe, France (2017)

images.title: Mankini Borat style on the beach - walking man from the sea.jpg

images.title: Dieppe, Seine-Maritime - France (11399378394).jpg
images.description:
* moteur - engine type: XU 9J4
  • cylindrée - displacement: L4 1 905 cc, inj. Bosch Motronic ML4.1
  • puissance - max. power output: 118 kW @ 6 500 rpm
  • couple maxi - torque: 177 Nm @ 5 000 rpm
  • transmission - gearbox: man. 5
  • Lxl: 4,05x1,63 m
  • pneus - tires: 195/55 VR 15
  • réservoir - fuel tank: 55 l
  • vol. coffre - trunk: 395 l
  • poids - tare: 975 kg
  • V max. - top speed: 220 km/h
En 92-93 la GTI16 est équipée d'un catalyseur, faisant chuter la puissance à 148 ch et ramenant la vitesse de pointe à 215 km/h.

images.title: Dieppe, Seine-Maritime - France (10245008375).jpg
images.description:
A great looking Rover 218SD turbo - An anglo-japanese car with a french engine for the diesel version (turbocharged 1.8 XUD7T Peugeot diesel engine).

I remember them being considered as "premium" in France. Le luxe Britannique!
